name: Agent Instruction Sync
description: Bundled routine template for proposing provider-agnostic merges of global agent instruction files.

capabilities.label: Agent Instruction Sync
capabilities.description: Review AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, then propose one agent-agnostic instruction body that can be shared across supported harnesses.

routineTemplate.prompt: Read the configured global AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md files. Produce a proposed unified instruction document that preserves user intent, removes provider-specific language unless explicitly necessary, and keeps Exo/Exograph context in a clearly marked managed section. Do not overwrite, delete, or symlink files. Output a reviewable proposal and call out conflicts that require human choice.
